scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n main,react,vue -c blue,cyan,green "npm --prefix main run dev" "npm --prefix apps/react-app run dev" "npm --prefix apps/vue-app run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix main run build && npm --prefix apps/react-app run build && npm --prefix apps/vue-app run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix main install && npm --prefix apps/react-app install && npm --prefix apps/vue-app install
